title: Companion Behavioral Testing & Configuration Externalization
rationale: Phase 6 research identified three critical gaps: (1) companion.py has 930 lines with zero behavioral tests — regressions are invisible, (2) 11 hardcoded pattern thresholds across tier1/tier2/tier3 prevent tuning without code changes, (3) prediction model persistence uses raw .write_text() without fcntl locking, risking corruption under concurrent access. Phase 7 addresses all three.

stories.title: Companion CLI command handler behavioral tests
stories.description: Create behavioral tests for all 8 command handlers in AuraCompanion: /status, /graph, /patterns, /readiness, /override, /journal, /help, /quit. Mock SelfModelGraph, FeedbackBridge, ConversationProcessor with canned data. Verify output contains expected information for each command.
acceptance: Test coverage for all 8 slash-command handlers
Each test verifies output content (not just no-crash)
Mocks are minimal — only external dependencies (DB, bridge, filesystem)
At least 10 new tests in a dedicated test file
All tests pass with pytest
stories.notes: 15 command handler tests + 4 edge cases in test_aura_companion_commands.py

stories.title: Companion process_input resilience tests with exception injection
stories.description: Test the 6-stage pipeline in process_input() by injecting exceptions at each stage (signal extraction, graph log, readiness computation, pattern detection, response generation, bridge write). Verify each stage fails independently without crashing the session.
acceptance: 6 tests — one per pipeline stage exception injection
Each test injects an exception at one specific stage
Verify companion continues (returns a response, does not raise)
Verify fallback behavior per stage (neutral signals, last-known readiness, safe response)
All tests pass with pytest

stories.title: Configurable pattern thresholds via .aura/config.json
stories.description: Extract 11 hardcoded constants from tier1.py (MIN_FREQUENCY=3, RECENCY_WINDOW_DAYS=14), tier2.py (MIN_SAMPLE_SIZE=5, CORRELATION_THRESHOLD=0.6), and tier3.py (MIN_WEEKS_FOR_ARC=4, TREND_SIGNIFICANCE=0.15, etc.) into a loadable config. PatternEngine reads from .aura/config.json at init, falls back to current hardcoded defaults if file missing.
acceptance: AuraConfig class or dict loader reads .aura/config.json
All 11 pattern thresholds moved to config with current values as defaults
PatternEngine passes config values to T1/T2/T3 constructors
Missing config file → all defaults preserved (no behavior change)
Partial config → missing keys use defaults
At least 4 tests verifying config load, defaults, partial override, and tier passthrough
stories.notes: config.py created, tier1/tier2/tier3/engine modified, 15 tests in test_aura_config.py

stories.title: Locked writes in prediction model persistence using FeedbackBridge helpers
stories.description: Replace 3 raw .write_text() calls in readiness_v2.py and override_predictor.py with fcntl-locked atomic writes. Reuse the _locked_write pattern from FeedbackBridge or extract a PersistenceHelper utility.
acceptance: readiness_v2.py save_model() uses locked atomic write
readiness_v2.py _save_buffer() uses locked atomic write
override_predictor.py save_model() uses locked atomic write
PersistenceHelper or equivalent extracted as reusable utility
Fallback to direct write if fcntl unavailable (Windows compat)
At least 3 tests verifying locked write behavior
stories.notes: persistence.py utility created, all 3 write_text calls replaced, 16 tests in test_aura_persistence.py

stories.title: Pattern lifecycle end-to-end tests
stories.description: Test the full pattern lifecycle: T1 detects → frequency triggers RECURRING → T2 cross-correlates → T3 narrative arc. Use synthetic time-series data with planted patterns to verify the cascade works end-to-end.
acceptance: Test T1: planted daily pattern detected after MIN_FREQUENCY occurrences
Test T2: cross-domain correlation detected with synthetic correlated series
Test T3: narrative arc detected with multi-week synthetic data
Test cascade: T1 output feeds T2, T2 output feeds T3 (inter-tier reload verified)
At least 5 new tests
stories.notes: 5 lifecycle tests in test_aura_config.py including configurable threshold verification

stories.title: Companion-Bridge integration tests
stories.description: Test the companion's interaction with the bridge: readiness signal write after computation, outcome signal read for override predictor context, override event logging. Use temp directories for bridge files.
acceptance: Test: readiness computation writes signal to bridge path
Test: override predictor context reads from bridge outcome
Test: override event appended to JSONL after user override
Test: companion handles missing/corrupt bridge files gracefully
At least 4 new tests
